title: Remotion + Gemini Media Enhancement
description: 22 pre-rendered Remotion video compositions (11 solution pages + 11 case study pages) that visualize real annotation workflows using actual S3 media samples and annotation JSON data.

stories.title: Extract Shared Remotion Components from EgocentricPipeline Prototype
stories.description: Extract reusable components from EgocentricPipeline.tsx into src/remotion/shared/. Foundation for all 8 composition types.
acceptance_criteria: DesignTokens.ts exports TOKENS with colors, fonts, bbox as const
BoundingBox.tsx with BoundingBoxProps interface extracted from EgocentricPipeline lines 91-165
MetadataPanel.tsx with MetadataPanelProps, MetadataSection, MetadataRow interfaces
ProgressBar.tsx with animated horizontal bar using Remotion interpolate
BottomBar.tsx with CLARU-branded timestamp bar and scrub indicator
TerminalHeader.tsx with macOS-style terminal title bar
RadarChart.tsx with 5-axis radar/spider chart using SVG with animated fill
TaxonomyTree.tsx with animated hierarchical label tree
VerdictBadge.tsx with verdict indicator (PASS/FAIL/SELECTED/REJECTED), no crown/trophy/stamp/flash
TechMetadataOverlay.tsx with codec, resolution, fps, duration overlay
All shared components import from DesignTokens.ts
All components export their prop interfaces
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors

stories.title: Create Composition Manifest and Root.tsx Registry
stories.description: Create composition-manifest.json with 22 entries and update Root.tsx to dynamically register all compositions.

stories.title: Create Render Pipeline Script
stories.description: Build scripts/render-all.ts that reads the manifest and renders each composition to MP4 using Remotion CLI.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/render-all.ts is a TypeScript script runnable with tsx
Reads composition-manifest.json and iterates all 22 compositions
For each: runs npx remotion render with --codec h264 --crf 23 --props
Renders in batches of 2 (CPU-bound concurrency)
After each render: checks file size -- warns if > 10 MB, re-renders with --crf 28 if > 15 MB
Outputs a summary table: composition ID, type, duration, file size, status
Creates public/videos/ directory if it doesn't exist
Script accepts optional --composition {id} flag to render a single composition
Script accepts optional --dry-run flag that prints render commands without executing
remotion:render and remotion:pipeline scripts added to package.json
Exits with non-zero code if any composition fails to render

stories.title: Create Gemini Enrichment Pipeline Script
stories.description: Build scripts/gemini-enrich.ts that downloads S3 samples, extracts frames with ffmpeg, sends to Gemini 2.5 Flash with type-specific prompts, validates with Zod, and saves enrichment JSON for all 22 compositions.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/gemini-enrich.ts is a TypeScript script runnable with tsx
Script reads composition-manifest.json and processes ALL 22 compositions
Downloads S3 video/image samples with 404 fallback and missing-samples.log
Extracts frames using ffmpeg -vf fps={fps},scale=512:-1
Loads type-specific prompt templates from scripts/gemini-prompts/type-{N}.txt
Types 1, 8: Gemini generates ALL annotation data
Types 2-7: Gemini SUPPLEMENTS real annotation data
Sends frames as base64 inline data to Gemini 2.5 Flash with responseMimeType: application/json
Validates against Zod schema per type; retries once with stricter prompt on failure
Writes enrichment JSON to public/remotion-assets/enrichments/{id}.json
Concurrency limit of 3, 1-second delay between batches
Exponential backoff (2s base, max 5 retries) for rate limits
Prompt templates for ALL 8 types in scripts/gemini-prompts/type-{1-8}.txt
Accepts --composition {id} flag for single composition
Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY in .env.local; exits with clear error if missing
remotion:enrich script added to package.json

stories.title: Create Real Annotation Data Extraction Script
stories.description: Build scripts/extract-annotations.ts that downloads existing S3 annotation JSONs for compositions with annotationSource: real, extracts relevant fields per type, validates against Zod schemas, and writes formatted JSON for Remotion.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/extract-annotations.ts is a TypeScript script runnable with tsx
Script reads composition-manifest.json and filters to annotationSource === real
For each composition: queries Supabase for s3_annotation_key, downloads annotation JSON from S3
Extracts and transforms per type: Type 2 (Pairwise), Type 3 (Multi-Gen), Type 4 (Detection), Type 5 (Classification), Type 6 (Quality Rubric), Type 7 (Safety)
Validates extracted data against per-type Zod schemas
Writes formatted JSON to public/remotion-assets/annotations/{id}.json
Downloads media files to public/remotion-assets/samples/{id}.{ext}
If sample 404s, tries next sample in dataset
Accepts --composition {id} flag for single composition
remotion:extract script added to package.json
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors

stories.title: Type 3 -- Multi-Gen Gallery Composition
stories.description: Build MultiGenGalleryComposition showing a 2x4 grid of 8 image generations with checkmark/X filtering and best-of-N selection. Uses real annotation data from AI Image Generation Evaluation dataset.
acceptance_criteria: MultiGenGalleryComposition.tsx accepts { compositionId: string } props
Renders 2x4 grid of 8 generation images from annotation JSON metadata.generations array
Prompt types out above grid from metadata.prompt
Images stagger in (6 frames apart)
Green checkmarks on selectedImages (6 of 8) via VerdictBadge variant:badge
Red Xs on rejected (2 of 8)
Subtle accent border glow on bestImage via VerdictBadge variant:border-glow -- NOT a crown
Stats: 6/8 acceptable (75%), 1 best with animated counter
Timeline: 0-30 grid fades, 30-90 images appear, 90-120 prompt types, 120-180 checkmarks/Xs, 180-210 selection highlight, 210-240 stats, 240-300 hold
Includes TechMetadataOverlay, BottomBar with Generation Eval
types.ts with Type3Annotation
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors

stories.title: Type 2 -- Pairwise Arena Composition
stories.description: Build PairwiseArenaComposition showing split-screen A vs B comparison with both videos playing simultaneously and selection highlight. Uses real annotation data showing which video was preferred.
acceptance_criteria: PairwiseArenaComposition.tsx accepts { compositionId: string } props
Renders two videos side by side (50/50 split) -- Video A left, Video B right
Prompt text types out at top from annotation data
Selected video determined from real annotation data (betterVideoId, selectedAnswer, bestVideo)
Selected gets subtle accent border glow (#92B090) -- non-selected dims. NO crown/trophy.
Neutral split divider label (e.g. A | B or Config 21 | Config 41)
cs-vid-eval: handles configLabels for config comparison
cs-prompt-bench: handles categoryLabel with verification checkmark
Timeline: 0-30 fade in + divider, 30-60 prompt types, 60-180 play, 180-240 selection glow + dim, 240-360 hold
Includes TechMetadataOverlay and BottomBar with Arena label
types.ts with Type2Annotation, Type2VideoRef, FALLBACK_TYPE2_ANNOTATION
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors

stories.title: Type 7 -- Safety Shield Composition
stories.description: Build SafetyShieldComposition showing video with scanning overlay, prompt analysis, and binary verdict badges. Uses real policy violation annotation data from the Content Safety dataset.
acceptance_criteria: SafetyShieldComposition.tsx accepts { compositionId: string } props
Content area shows blurred/pixelated visual (never actual unsafe content) with scanning line animation
Prompt text from metadata.prompt types out in terminal-style overlay panel via TerminalHeader
Dual-channel verdict badges: Text Policy PASS/VIOLATION + Video Policy PASS/VIOLATION via VerdictBadge
sol-eu-ai-act: EU AI Act article reference badges (Art.52, Art.6) in EU blue #003399
cs-red-team: dual-channel Phase 1 (text scan) then Phase 2 (video scan)
Shield icon fills green (pass) or red (violation)
Timeline: 0-30 blur fade, 30-60 scan, 60-90 prompt types, 90-150 text verdict, 150-210 video verdict, 210-270 shield, 270-300 fade
Includes TechMetadataOverlay, BottomBar with Safety Review
types.ts with Type7Annotation
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors
